ERR_SERVER_VALIDATOR_NOT_AVAILABLE: Error isn't possible validate request data
ERR_SERVER_READING_REQUEST_BODY: Error trying to read request body
ERR_REQUEST_VALIDATOR_GENERAL: At least one field' outside valid parameters
ERR_REQUEST_VALIDATOR_ALPHANUM: Field {{.Field}} only can contains letters and numbers
ERR_REQUEST_VALIDATOR_SECUREPASSWORD: Field {{.Field}} is invalid. Must contain, one upper case letter, one lower case letter, a number and special character
ERR_USER_CREATE_REGISTER: Error on user register, check request data
